name: NU Admission - Smart Admission System
desc: A Django-based student admission system for NU Lipa, allowing student registration, admin management, and future ML integration for processing applications.

name: AI Caimito Fruit Classification Using Deep Learning
desc: Developed an image-based Caimito fruit classification model using deep learning to distinguish Caimito fruits from non-Caimito objects.

name: Coffea Liberica Farm Geo-Mapping System
desc: A mobile app for mapping and managing Coffea Liberica farms in batangas.

name: IP Geolocation Tracker
desc: A full-stack web app built with React and Node.js that lets users search any IPv4 address and visualize its location on an interactive map. Features JWT authentication, persistent search history, and real-time geolocation lookup via a custom REST API.

name: Personal Portfolio Website
desc: A personal portfolio website built with React and Tailwind CSS to showcase my projects and skills.
